title: Block Physics Overhaul
body:
**Requires** [***SKDS Core***](https://modrinth.com/mod/skds-core) **!**


This mod wil make block physics more realistic

Blocks will no longer float in air, they will fall instead
You can build various support structures such as arcs, pillars, girders etc


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LFONniwsfiw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
